basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) Manager, Engineer and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website gujaratmetrorail.com. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the GMRC Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical/Mechanical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Power Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent), B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering
qualification.details: Manager (Rolling Stock), Surat: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical/Mechanical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Power Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent) Engineer - Sr. Grade (Telecom), Ahmedabad/Gandhinagar: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunications/Applied Electronics/Industrial Electronics/Power Electronics/Instrumentation Engineer – Jr. Grade (Signalling): B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunications/Applied Electronics/Industrial Electronics/Power Electronics/Instrumentation Deputy General Manager (Track), Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering Manager (Track), Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering Asst. Manager (Civil), Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering

selection_process: Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GMRC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GMRC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GMRC Post of Civil Job 2026 Notification PDF Download GMRC Post of System Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Manager (Rolling Stock), Surat: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical/Mechanical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Power Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent) Engineer - Sr. Grade (Telecom), Ahmedabad/Gandhinagar: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunications/Applied Electronics/Industrial Electronics/Power Electronics/Instrumentation Engineer – Jr. Grade (Signalling): B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunications/Applied Electronics/Industrial Electronics/Power Electronics/Instrumentation Deputy General Manager (Track), Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering Manager (Track), Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering Asst. rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) recruitment is 22nd July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) has announced a total of 7 vacancies for various posts. These positions are spread across different departments and locations within Gujarat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for GMRC Various Posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a B.E/B.Tech degree in relevant engineering disciplines such as Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, or Electronics, or equivalent qualifications as specified for each post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the GMRC Various Posts will involve a Personal Interview, followed by Document Verification and a Medical Examination for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The positions announced under this GMRC recruitment are on a contract basis. Candidates will be appointed for a specific period as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the selected candidates for GMRC Recruitment 2026 be posted?
faq.answer: The posts are located in various cities within Gujarat, including Ahmedabad, Gandhinagar, and Surat, depending on the specific post applied for and the departmental requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat. It is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the GMRC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will be as per the Revised IDA scale, ranging from ₹30,000 to ₹2,00,000 per month, depending on the post and experience level.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official GMRC Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification for GMRC Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, which includes a direct link to the PDF document.
